underlying_goal: User wanted to understand why Livewire component conversion was failing and needed help with refactoring component architecture
friction_detail: Claude initially misunderstood the component architecture, attempted unnecessary conversions, introduced event payload mismatches causing type errors, and made overly complex changes before user interrupted
brief_summary: User wanted to understand Livewire conversion errors and refactor components; Claude provided good explanations but introduced multiple bugs through over-engineering and incorrect event handling, leading to incomplete resolution when user interrupted.
